tweets.text:
SECRETARY RUBIO: Everything you do as a country needs to be in your national interest. That includes immigration policy.

The U.S. is a welcoming country on immigration, but it has to be a process that is adjusted in every era to the realities of the modern times we live in. https://t.co/VjVXPpv2cY

tweets.text:
SECRETARY RUBIO: When this conflict began with Iran, the goals were outlined:

2. Reduce their ability to launch ballistic missiles
3. Damage their defense industrial base

Those objectives were achieved. https://t.co/9q6xu6E2Co
